meta.note: Seed data pre-populated from the Iris-journal reference files. Edit freely in the app — every save commits straight back to GitHub.

households.name: Sunshine Cottage
households.features: Yellow door, art studio, sunflower garden, piano in the hallway

households.name: The Foundation
households.features: Converted mill. Stone walls, dark wood, teal bench courtyard, detached workshop with robotics station. Sage green nursery. Butterfly bedroom. Pickup truck in the drive.

households.name: The Observatory
households.features: Where a storm cloud watches the sky his son fell out of and calls it science.

households.name: The Flat
households.features: Teal arched door, Hugo's bay-window bed, money tree

households.name: The Pebble House
households.features: Terracotta brick, teal arched door, alphabetical bookshelf

households.name: Pressed Flowers
households.features: Craftsman cottage, naturalist study, vegetable patches

people.name: Samuel Hill

moments.notes: The inspector said EWWW DISGUSTING about the flamingo but was HUMBLED by the vegetables. Cannot believe she wasnt already a member. The naturalist is OFFICIAL.

moments.event: Wants PERFECT garden score — locked!!
moments.notes: Got in but wasnt perfect. The flamingo cost her points. When Idris moves out the flamingo goes WITH HIM and the perfect score becomes possible.
